title: [NO TESTS NEEDED] Improve binding generator
body:
This allows to have slices other than slices of strings in options structs.

Before this wasn't possible:
```go
type WaitOptions struct {
	Conditions []define.ContainerStatus // <- non-string slice
	Interval   time.Duration
	Latest     bool
}
```

comments.body: @rhatdan  [NO TESTS NEEDED] should be only in PR title, not it commit message? if so I'll remove that from the messages.
@baude I removed debugging code (the default case of a switch), and fixed indentation on one place. Please lgtm again.
